sections.title: If the player has no dream prepared in the vial

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Welcome to the Nightmare Zone! Would you like me to create a dream for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: My name's Dominic Onion but you can call me Dom, or Mr Onion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Mr Oni...Dom, how did you get that name?

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Well that's a long story...but I can tell you that it involved my parents, 3 blurberry specials, and a chinchompa.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...and a chinchompa?

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Oh yes, Nigel played a crucial role in the whole debacle. It's all very amusing now that I think back to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right...

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Good times...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: This is the Nightmare Zone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wwwwhat?!

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Don't worry, it's not as bad as it sounds...most of the time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's comforting.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Truth be told, that name wasn't my first choice, it's what the local folk have been calling it and so it sort of stuck.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: My original plan came to me in a vivid dream when I was younger you see, I saw myself running a successful business from a great structure in a strange land.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Well, I say strange, but I'd never left Lunar Isle at the time and this place was very hot and dry, unlike anything I'd seen before.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: When I told my father about the dream he laughed and said I should become a banker like him and his father before him but in that moment I knew that it wasn't the life for me.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I had to find out what this dream meant and if it was a vision of the future or not.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Growing up, I studied hard to find out more about magic, especially oneiromancy and the interpretation of dreams.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Having learned as much as I could on Lunar Isle I set out to find and learn from other great wizards I'd heard of in stories as a child.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I set off to travel the world, discovering more about dreams to enable me to understand the dream I'd had as a child.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I needed to know what this dream meant and if it was truly a vision of the future.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: If so I knew I had to try and find this location and build the huge tower I saw.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I was going to call it 'Dom Onion's Tower', but I've not found this strange place or gathered enough money to build it just yet.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: That's why I've setup this small business venture in the mean time selling dreams to people. I just need a big enough crowd to kickstart my business.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: It's all part of my five year plan, and who knows, perhaps my dream will come true; I'll discover this place and build Dom Onion's Tower!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about the dreams?

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Certainly. I can delve into your memories and search for the key events that have affected you on your adventures.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I then take the essence of these memories and put that in the vial you see on the plinth.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I imbue a bit of magic, then give the vial a bit of a shake, and when you drink it you'll be able to re-live an encounter close to the original.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Don't worry though, when you're in a dream, you're perfectly safe even if it does seem very real.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: If you sucessfully overcome the dream or die trying, you'll leave the dream state and return to normal with your grey matter and appendages intact.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are all dreams the same or are there different options?

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Oh no, they can vary wildly! You can choose from one of three main options.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Firstly, I can create a one-on-one encounter with an adversary you've defeated in your adventures. People like to practice in these dreams.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Then there's a sort of Endurance dream, where you face enemies in encounter after encounter, and try to survive to the end.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: And finally there's something I like to call a Rumble, where you face multiple adversaries at the same time. I imbue a bit more magic and shake the vial harder to create that one!

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: You can invite friends to fight alongside you in a Rumble dream. Once I've set up the dream for you, step into the enclosure and invite up to 4 friends.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: For the Endurance and Rumble dreams, I charge a fee for my work. I don't like handling the money directly, so instead I've set up a secure coffer.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: After you've asked me to set up a dream, put some money in my coffer. I'll deduct the fee from the coffer when you start the dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: There's a red vial on the other plinth. Your friends can drink from it to enter your dream as a spectator to observe your progress.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Finally here's one other option you get, and that's how difficult the encounters are. As well as the normal dreams, the bravest adventurers can choose a harder version*.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I choose a dream?

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Certainly. You can practice for free, but the larger dreams require more skill to imbue the potions and so there's a fee for those.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've prepared your dream. Drink from the vial in the enclosure when you're ready to fight.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've prepared your dream. Drink from the vial in the enclosure when you're ready to fight.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: For an Endurance dream, normal mode, I'll want 1,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've prepared your dream. Drink from the vial in the enclosure when you're ready to fight. I'll deduct 1,000 coins from the coffer when you do.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: For an Endurance dream, hard mode, I'll want 5,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've prepared your dream. Drink from the vial in the enclosure when you're ready to fight. I'll deduct 5,000 coins from the coffer when you do.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: For a Rumble dream, normal mode, I'll want 2,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've prepared your dream. Step into the enclosure, invite up to 4 players to join you, then drink from the vial to begin. Each of you will need to unlock the coffer and have 2,000 coins deposited first.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: For a Rumble dream, hard mode, I'll want 6,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've prepared your dream. Step into the enclosure, invite up to 4 players to join you, then drink from the vial to begin. Each of you will need to unlock the coffer and have 6,000 coins deposited first.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: For a customisable Rumble dream, normal mode, I'll want 12,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've prepared your dream. Step into the enclosure, invite up to 4 players to join you, then drink from the vial to begin. Each of you will need to unlock the coffer and have 12,000 coins deposited first.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: For a customisable Rumble dream, hard mode, I'll want 16,000 coins. I'll deduct the money from the coffer when you start the dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've prepared your dream. Step into the enclosure, invite up to 4 players to join you, then drink from the vial to begin. Each of you will need to unlock the coffer and have 16,000 coins deposited first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll come back another time.

sections.title: If the player has a dream prepared in the vial

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: You haven't started that dream I created for you. Can I help you with something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to change my dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Okay, I've emptied the vial. I have not taken any money from you for that dream, since you never started it.

sections.title: Using the right click Dream option while the player has a dream prepared in the vial

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I've already created a dream for you. Do you want me to cancel it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please cancel it.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Okay, I've emptied the vial. I have not taken any money from you for that dream, since you never started it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, don't cancel it.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Okay. Drink from the vial when you're ready to start the dream.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: No, try again.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: I have a question for you.

lines.speaker: Dominic Onion
lines.text: Here, have this.
